_provenance.note: display row + point budget read from schema-unmapped columns; verified against the in-game UI (4 rows x 3 layout; pick ANY keystones up to a 4-point cap, no per-row limit).

keystones.name: Stitch the Flesh
keystones.flavour:
Did you think I would let a simple thing
like dying interfere with our work?
stats: Your Maps have an additional Revival, up to 6

keystones.name: Refined Formula
keystones.flavour: Let's make this a little more... efficient.
stats: Expeditions have only 1 Explosive
150% increased Expedition Explosive Radius
100% increased Expedition Explosive Placement Range
Grand Expeditions have only 5 Explosives

keystones.name: Evolutionary Pressure
keystones.flavour:
The leylines can affect more than just
the terrain... curious...
stats: 1% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Monsters per Explicit Modifier on the Map
2% increased Effectiveness of Monsters per Explicit Modifier on the Map
Rare Monsters have a 3% increased chance of Monster Modifiers per Explicit Modifier on the Map

keystones.name: Improved Calibration
keystones.flavour:
The more we work with these leylines,
the more I feel I... understand them...
stats: Waystones have 25% more effect of Prefix Modifiers or 25% more effect of Suffix Modifiers when opening Maps

keystones.name: Disengaged Safeties
keystones.flavour:
Our long-term survival no longer matters.
We are already dead men walking.
stats: Map Areas are Irradiated

keystones.name: Careful Procurement
keystones.flavour:
We will need quite a few resources if
we are to succeed. I will teach you.
stats: Magic Monster Packs have 35% chance to have an additional Modifier

keystones.name: Volatile Connection
keystones.flavour:
I need more data on a new process.
Please, do what you do best.
stats: 15% chance areas are Cleansed or Corrupted

keystones.name: Mechanical Guardians
keystones.flavour:
Their creators are long since dust,
but their duty remains.
stats:
Non-Unique Strongboxes are guarded by a dormant Construct
These Strongboxes only roll Modifiers which apply to the Construct
Opening the Strongbox activates the Construct
Strongboxes have 2% increased Item Quantity per Modifier

keystones.name: Hidden Patterns
keystones.flavour:
It's all connected. The Grand Project...
I can almost see its intent...
stats: 10% chance when completing a Map to make nearby Maps accessible

keystones.name: Dam the River
keystones.flavour:
There's some sort of energy flow
underneath reality. Could it be...?
stats: Azmeri Spirits only Possess monsters after reaching maximum empowerment

keystones.name: Remnants of Greatness
keystones.flavour:
They are drawn to the power of the
Grand Project. They know not why.
stats: Map Bosses have 20% chance to be guarding a Precursor Terraformer which can be used to change the biome of a group of maps nearby

keystones.name: Head of the Snake
keystones.flavour:
We need a smarter strategy.
We must aim for the top.
stats: Pinnacle Bosses have a single Revive
Pinnacle Bosses have 25% chance to drop an additional Unique item
Powerful Map Bosses have 5% chance when defeated to reveal a nearby Citadel

keystones.name: Breeding Season
keystones.flavour: What's gotten into this lot, I wonder?
stats: Rare Monsters have 25% increased chance of Monster Modifiers
15% increased Rare Monsters

keystones.name: Mighty Prey
keystones.flavour:
Some days you're the spear,
some days you're the boar!
stats: 25% chance to upgrade Map Bosses to Powerful Map Bosses

keystones.name: Scarred Lands
keystones.flavour:
Something terrible
happened here long ago.
stats: 20% increased number of Rare Expedition Monsters
15% increased number of Runic Monster Markers

keystones.name: Dangerous Game
keystones.flavour: They're not gonna make it easy.
stats: Rogue Exiles have 20% chance to Flee to an adjacent Map and upgrade their Equipment

keystones.name: Soul Eaters
keystones.flavour:
Some days, the hunt is
thankless and brutal.
stats: Map Bosses have 2% increased Effectiveness per 100 Power of Monsters slain in the Area

keystones.name: Will of the Draíocht
keystones.flavour:
Sometimes, they hold out for bigger prey.
I ken there's a reason.
stats: Azmeri Spirits cannot Possess Rare Monsters

keystones.name: Call of the Spirits
keystones.flavour:
All you've got do is listen, aye,
and they'll guide you on.
stats: Possessed Unique Monsters release Spirits on death

keystones.name: Ancient Inscriptions
keystones.flavour:
Got no idea what they say,
but they seem to fit together.
stats: 8% increased effect of Explicit Modifiers on Tablets for each type of Tablet affecting Map area

keystones.name: Lethal Adaptation
keystones.flavour:
Something's changin' 'em.
Be ready to get bloody.
stats: 40% increased Effectiveness of Unique Monsters with Modifiers

keystones.name: Patient Battue
keystones.flavour:
I'll make some noise and holler. Let's
see if I can drive them your way!
stats: 25% chance 1 Rare Monster is replaced by a random Map Boss
5% chance 3 additional Rare Monsters are replaced by a random Map Boss

keystones.name: Gutting and Skinning
keystones.flavour:
Use every part of what you kill.
To do otherwise is disrespectful.
stats: Pinnacle Bosses may be scavenged for 5% chance to drop an additional Unique item
1% chance Unique Monsters may be scavenged for a Unique item

keystones.name: Claimed Territories
keystones.flavour:
You really wanna challenge their claim?
Alright then... let's see how this goes.
stats: Overlord's Influence and Overlord's Domain Atlas Passive Skills have 45% chance to add twice as much content

keystones.name: Trove Seekers
keystones.flavour:
The Order hunts and secures artefacts
too powerful for the world to handle.
stats: 100% increased amount of Rare Chests
Strongboxes have 100% increased chance to be Unique

keystones.name: In The Wrong Hands
keystones.flavour:
...there is no telling what damage
could be wrought by such relics.
stats: Powerful Map Bosses drop an additional unique item

keystones.name: Unexpected Missions
keystones.flavour: We go where our duty demands.
stats: Corrupted Waystones open a Random Map Area when used on Basic Maps
Corrupted Waystones open Maps with 1 additional random Modifier

keystones.name: Unforeseen Threats
keystones.flavour: We must remain vigilant.
stats: 5% chance on completing Maps for a nearby Anomaly Map to be revealed

keystones.name: Mysterious Gifts
keystones.flavour:
I have no answers for you.
Some things... simply exist.
stats: Unique Monsters have 1% chance to drop a Cryptic Key
Rare Strongbox Monsters have 5% chance to drop a Cryptic Key

keystones.name: Eastern Knowledge
keystones.flavour:
The Order has had Kalguuran
members... at times.
stats: Verisium Remnants have 10% chance to be rolled an additional time, keeping the rarest outcome

keystones.name: Partial Translations
keystones.flavour:
We have spent centuries deciphering
Precursor writings. We know... a little.
stats: Randomly gain between 0 and 40% increased effect of Explicit Modifiers on Tablets

keystones.name: Stolen Relics
keystones.flavour:
Twenty years ago, the Order lost
much. We will recover it.
stats: Unique Strongboxes may be the Legacy of the Order, dropping a Twilight Reliquary Key

keystones.name: Long Days
keystones.flavour:
We do not have the benefit of rest.
Our task is never complete.
stats: 20% more chance of Random Extra Content

keystones.name: Keen Appraisal
keystones.flavour:
As a seeker of powerful artefacts,
I know how to spot master works.
stats: 50% increased Exceptional Items found

keystones.name: Untold Histories
keystones.flavour:
We are keepers of a world lost
to the marches of time.
stats: Pinnacle Bosses have an 50% increased chance to drop Lineage Supports
Pinnacle Bosses take 35% less Damage
35% increased chance to find Lineage Supports

keystones.name: Ancient Activations
keystones.flavour:
There is a great mystery all around us.
Be careful what you disturb.
stats: Powerful Map Bosses have 5% chance to add a Ancient Modifiers to a nearby Map
